xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #72

plan.title: Break tallies: daily goal progress bars

narratives.Description: Break tallies: daily goal progress bars
narratives.Overview:
## Summary

In the Breaks panel **Completed** section (added in #59), each break category (stretch / walk / water / custom) currently shows a numeric count plus Clear / Clear all. Enhance that section with visual progress toward a user-set Daily Goal.

## Context

Today (`BreakPanel` Completed UI):
- Header: “Completed” + Clear all
- Per-category rows: label, count, Clear
- Tallies persist in `localStorage` (`relaxanator.breakTallies`) via `src/lib/break-tallies.ts`

## Proposed UX

1. **Per-category progress bars** — For each break kind, a color-graduated bar that fills left → right as completed count increases toward the Daily Goal.
2. **Daily Goal slider** — One control that sets the shared daily target used by all category bars (or document if per-category goals are preferred; default assumption: one Daily Goal applies to each category independently).
3. **Goal met** — When a category’s count ≥ Daily Goal:
   - Bar color switches to green
   - A festive / celebratory icon appears at the end of the bar

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Each Completed category row includes a L→R graduated progress bar reflecting `count / dailyGoal` (clamped at 100% fill when over goal).
- [ ] A Daily Goal slider is available in/near the Completed section; changing it updates bar fill immediately.
- [ ] When `count >= dailyGoal` (and goal > 0), that row’s bar is green and shows a celebratory icon at the bar’s end.
- [ ] When below goal, bar uses the graduated (non-green) treatment; no celebratory icon.
- [ ] Daily Goal value persists across sessions (MAY use `localStorage`, same pattern as tallies / NFR-1).
- [ ] Existing Clear / Clear all and tally increment-on-“I did.” behavior remain unchanged.
- [ ] Accessible: progress communicates current vs goal (e.g. `role="progressbar"` or equivalent aria); slider is keyboard-operable and labeled.

## Notes / open points

- Confirm whether Daily Goal is one global value for all categories (recommended default) or per-category.
- Sensible slider range (e.g. 1–20) and default (e.g. 3–5) can be chosen at implement time.
- Visual style should fit existing Breaks panel / app chrome — polished, not generic dashboard chrome.

## Refs

- Builds on #59 (Completed tallies + localStorage)
